sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ مُهِمَّةً جِدًّا فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni se smatraju veoma važnim u našem svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones are considered very important in our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُهَا النَّاسُ لِلتَّحَدُّثِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِمْ وَالْبَحْثِ عَنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi ih koriste za razgovor s prijateljima i traženje informacija.
sentences.translationEn: People use them to talk with their friends and search for information.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةُ الصَّغِيرَةُ فِي تَنْظِيمِ وَقْتِنَا وَأَعْمَالِنَا.
sentences.translation: Ovi mali uređaji nam pomažu u organizaciji našeg vremena i poslova.
sentences.translationEn: These small devices help us organize our time and work.
